text.title: Multi-Agent Production Bus Worked Example
text.summary: MessageBus + ProductionMultiAgentSystem skeleton with three strategies.

example.note: Structured Message with handler timeout (r1, r2).
Parallel strategy with per-task timeout + cost gate (r-parallel, r5).

example.code: async def planner_handler(msg): response = await bus.send(Message(sender="planner", receiver="worker", content={"task": "x"})) # planner waits for worker async def worker_handler(msg): # worker tries to ask planner back — deadlock return await bus.send(Message(sender="worker", receiver="planner", content={"clarify": "?"}))
